review_text:
Clean.
Helpful staff.
Beautiful location on Linear Park and the beautiful river red gums.
Overall nice place to stay, budget rooms are not the best but not the worst. Bathrooms could use a little updating but totally fine for a couple days stay. Beds are comfy.
Great spot, quiet, peaceful, but close to everything. Bed very comfortable, room basic but clean and tidy
Great place. Great people.  What a delight.  Close to nature .
Lawns and facilities are maintained to a high standard. Price for a powere site is very favourable.
Super friendly staff, very helpful with our needs. Very quiet park and the locals were lovely

Would not recommend staying in the budget queen rooms unfortunately walls are paper thin. Neighbours had tv on all night so very little sleep could also hear everything from people next door sneezing, going to toilet and phone alarms.||Carpark is very small and tight.
Good little caravan park in Adelaide perfect for stop overs as your travelling through South Australia
Great staff and location to Adelaide CBD.
Excellent surroundings, parklands and walking tracks 👣

We 'had' a 3 month booking (booked well in advance in the office at WG) for the dates 28/12/25 - 4/4 26.  Phoned a week ahead to confirm and we were advised they moved our booking site.  We have been coming to this park for 3 years.  They know our van.  Our needs.  We've made it very clear in past due to moving us without communication we want to be advised, we have the right to cancel or accept the changes. They moved our booking site without any communication and our van will not fit in the new spot and they put us right next to a boom gate for 3 months.  Complete utterly dis-respect and dis-regard for our stay and needs.  Living on the road atm this could have been disastrous.  For those traveling from the country for hospital stays/surgery/recovery this would have been disastrous.  The motto at this park is 'If you don't like it leave'.  Its their park their rules.  Spoke to head office about this. MEH. Thoroughly disgusted with this park and the management.  The treatment of people visiting this park and being jacked around for the bottom dollar is appalling.  ZERO Stars if was allowed - how you treat people says it all but they lost me with the 'no Dog' signs and the attitude towards pets.  I'm done with this park!!!

The room was nice and clean very quiet setting lots of bird life we enjoyed our stay we were going to rebook for two more nights in January but we were told it is a minimum 4 nights booking very disappointing.but all up a nice park.
Nice park cabins need bathroom upgrades
Fantastic spot and a short walk to the klemzig bus interchange.

Well neat and clean place to stay at if you are on business or leisure. Room equiped with essential needs, owners were very kibd when I needed an iron and supplied me with one instantly. Recommend for next stay in future.

Such friendly staff and an absolutely beautiful location looking over the Torrens, great area but still peaceful and quiet. The staff were incredibly accomodating and helpful toward us with some issues on our end, can’t thank them enough and can’t wait to stay again!
The cabin was great. Close to the beach and had all the essentials
Was looked down upon when asking for a uncovered site 😳  , im self contained and dont need thier power ..
Wonderful
Great place to stay. We stayed in the double cabin and it was very clean and comfortable. Will definately be coming back

Amazing park, clean and comfy rooms, prices better then anywhere else. I stayed there 2 nights for Metallica and the fact its only 15 minutes from Adelaide oval was a no brainer. Only thing I can fault is the weak wifi. Definitely coming back A++++++
great location and price !

Stained carpets. Strange smell.
Paper thin walls. People next door up all night with tv going, arguing and swearing.
My son left three nights early because he couldn’t sleep. I had to check out one day early. No response to my complaint.
Won’t be going back.
Manager had his tools stolen from his workshop by a guest.
Sums it up.
Absolutely not a hotel but staff providing a very good service when I check in

沒什麼好挑剔  讚讚
就是交通稍微不方便

A larger area for caravan park but still have some accommodations to stay. The room was clean & tidy. I love the shower 🚿 cause high pressure makes me feel like water is massaging me.
Highly recommend
The room was cosy and clean. The lovely lady at reception was kind and happy to answer all questions.
The koala's were in the trees right behind the van. The walking trails are right on your doorstep. Transport the train /  bus line a comfortable 5 to 10 minute stroll through the lovely park!
Close to Klemzig interchange for obahn
Very clean safe and peaceful place too stay staff were very pleasant  😀
Clean and quiet until a aeroplane fly's over, lol
Enjoyed our stay there and what a great setting to be in, simply marvellous.

We booked a powered site at Windsor Gardens for 4 days while in Adelaide. This is one of the best caravan parks we have ever stayed in. Clean, beautiful grounds, well maintained, great central location, clean amenities and friendly staff. Definitely staying here on future visits to Adelaide.
A well maintained caravan park with a mix of sites available. Good friendly service

Great location backing on to beautiful parkland and many kms of walking/biking tracks. Our cabin was spotless. The park is very quiet at night
Tanya at reception was so friendly and incredibly helpful. Thanks so much Tanya for  your amazing customer service and making our stay a pleasure.
Cheers

Absolutely awful. Most of the permanent residents are crazy and wil ENJOY making your stay as unpleasant as possible. Poisoning your plants, playing loud music, yelling abuse, stench of alcohol, backing their car into your caravan and laughing, intruding into your private awning space, overfilled sanitary bins that stench of rotting flesh in the bathroom, not a nice place. I recommend any other caravan park. Awful WiFi as well.
Great van Park and cabins.

A basic but roomy caravan park close to the Adelaide CBD.
The highlight is its proximity on the Linear Park trail, which is must do trail for walkers or runners.
The camp kitchen is adequate, but small for the size of the park. It located adjacent to the park entrance.
The bathroom amenities are large and clean
Excellent
Great location, check-in after hours was a breeze. Check out was easy, amenities were well maintained and clean. Happy camper!
Great people and great operators. Highly recommended.
No swimming pool!
Posto carino, buoni prezzi e servizi puliti.

Stayed in budget queen room.
No WiFi it's 2025
Can hear neighbours every move
No window
Under flight path
Stained bed linen
One small milk
Carpet needs to be replaced

Excellent customer service

Ho trascorso una notte in camping con il mio van. Ambienti molto puliti e curati nei minimi dettagli. Receptionist attenta a darci tutte le indicazioni e dopo aver chiesto consigli ci ha risposto con garbo ed entusiasmo. Facile la connessione al centro città con i mezzi pubblici (diretti senza cambio bus). Piazzole con la giusta luce di notte e ambiente silenzioso e rispettoso. Consigliato!!

The location is perfect close to all the attractions and activities on your itinerary.
* Management / Reception customer service, they are very happy to help.
* Lots of Clean Toilets and Showers.
* Pet 🐕 friendly
* Outside the fence is the best walking track that goes around a park reserve, with a beautiful creek and running water.
You can walk your dog on leash.
---------
NOT GREAT:
Sites at the front of the Park ones closest to the road are crammed in. Honestly there is not enough SPACE for you to maneuver, if there is someone across from you and beside you, you will find it VERY DIFFICULT TO PARK.
PLUS at the front EDGE OF EACH SITE it has a high lip that adds an extra degree to your reversing skills, try NOT TO DAMAGE your or someone else's property.
🚩TRY AND GET A SITE to the back of the park, on the fence line.
More space with less stress.

Stayed in our own van.
Clean amenities,  friendly staff.

It really is a place that comes across as any new visitors are intruding. Everyone is very suspicious and there is no help offered.

The games room, laundry and kitchen are all in one room. There is no fridge so all my food went off.

No place to escape the heat either.

Unless you are older and have a caravan I would give this place a miss especially in summer.

I am appalled by the staff's behaviour during the initial hours of my stay. I had booked a cabin for 2 nights, travelling from Perth to Sydney with 2 cars and a very large trailer. When I arrived to check in, I was greeted by 3 disgruntled staff members who all made me feel alienated, unwelcome and made to feel like a burden for bringing additional belongings with me. They had advised there is no room for my trailer, even though I was willing to pay additional for a caravan spot (which is understandable), and I take ownership for not advising them in advance of the additional trailer parking requirement, however, instead of assisting and treating me like a human, I was met with hostility. One rolled their eyes at me, I was told numerous times that I was in the way while simply trying to check in and resolve the issue, and another gave me several solutions within the park that were quickly deemed unsuitable all of a sudden. There was one staff member who was very lovely in trying to assist, and I thank this staff member. By the end, I was asked to park all of my belonging outside of the park and on the street. I have stayed at many caravan parks in the past, and this was not the first, second or third on this trip, and this has never happened before. The lack of professionalism and basic manners was astounding, especially for a caravan park who's primary job is to accommodate caravans and larger vehicles. Will never return nor recommend.
Nice little park close to the city

Lets start with not impressed. We booked a particular site back in March this year. During the year the park name changed so we rang to check that our booking/site still stands (we were told yes, all was good). A week before our arrival date, we rang to see if we could get into our booked site one day earlier. We were told no, sorry there was someone currently on that site. Arrival date came and we drove into Park and we noticed that the site that we had booked was not vacant 😦. My wife went into office to check in and she was told that some people had extended their stays. So we therefore lost the site that we had. We were not informed of this and was out on another site. There were reasons for our original site which I expressed to the office person. He said sorry about this. I asked which site they were putting us on which was a lot tighter to get on. There was another site I asked about but was told that site is popular and is usually booked 3 years out during Xmas season, yet we were moved from our site 🤔. This was our fourth time staying at this park, unfortunately not returning.

We stayed there with our van.|Nice clean park with roomy and clean amenities.|Camp kitchen well laid out and clean.|Sites good.|Site fees good.|Location good. Public transport 350 m walk to bus stop into city.|Shopping centre,  5 minute drive and 2 pubs nearby.|Would I stay here again - yes.|Would I recommend -yes.
Great spot
Overall satisfactory except for the location - a bit far from the city and unlike hotel/motel, no daily replenishment of coffee, tea, bath soap, shampoo etc.
Lovely cabins, clean and comfortable. Easy access to city bus for the Adelaide 500. Reasonably priced for family of 4. Will definitely recommend and be back.
Staff very happy to help and deal with
Good/cheap spot to park up the van, ammenities were clean and all occupants looked after the place, would go again
The rooms are clean and tidy. The park is close to public transport and a lovely view of the river.

Nice little park, first stay here in a powered drive through site.

Good value for money

Just be aware reception closes at 5 pm so if you don't want to go through the late check process be here before 5 😂
Great value and great location. Stayed in a budget queen unit. Nice and quiet.

The Echo Holiday Park and Budget Units is a lovely place to stay, I found the budget room to be just what im looking for.
It's close to my  friends, so I'll be staying here every time I come down for a visit 😊

Booked a camping site and the site we were given was probably about 2 metres from the dump site which we were facing as well. We constantly heard people using the dump site and the stench at times if people didn’t use chemicals was unbearable and unacceptable

Last time we were in Adelaide we stayed at a caravan park close to the city.  This park has been so much nicer.  Beautiful parklands just behind the caravan park. Amenities are spotless. Reception were helpful. We caught an easy bus ride into the city.  Highly recommend this park, would stay again.

One of the few city caravan parks in Adelaide nice location next to Torrens River but in a busy area had a standard caravan site gravel base next to ammenities block which was huge and clean only issue was again entitled people who think they can use the showers with out a thought for any one else by using all of the plentiful supply of hot water I struggle getting my head around these selfish people, any way a nice little park fit for purpose.
A great, quiet park in a very convenient location. We stayed on a power site and had no issues. The staff are lovely and easy to go for a stroll along the Linear Path.
Great spot as a base for exploring Adelaide! Staff are very friendly and accommodating. Park and facilities are well maintained and presented. Great price, great location, and great people!
我和酒店溝通，他們說我住一星期佢地只换一次牀單，我今次住二天，他們没有幫你執牀，相對,其他酒店，不換牀單也幫忙執牀，最不好是没有清理垃圾和加添coffee and milky,昨為為工作來入住，也希望晚上回來可以休息吓，饮杯cooffe, 他們應該改善吓，否則我唔會介绍朋友。
Very quiet very comfortable

Our first time to stay at this park and I thought that it was a real oasis in the suburbs.  The North East Road is extremely busy, but to be surrounded by a quiet neighbourhood, parks and having the river there for walks was great.  Very convenient for hotels, cafes, shopping etc.  We had a Budget Queen room which was very economical and had everything that we needed for our stay.  The shower was great too!  We had Room 25 which was right next to the kitchen which is very handy if you would like to prepare your own meals, but a bit noisy in the morning with the cleaners if you're looking for a lay-in.  Would stay again!!
Carpet was wet in main room floor was dirty walls were dirty
Great park, facilities are always clean great atmosphere thru out. Staff are lovely and helpful.

The showers almost all need new shower heads. When turned on they spurt in all directions. Rest of shower block needs upgrading and a good paint and clean.  Otherwise a reasonable park in a handy position close to all facilities including the bus to the city.

We stayed in a budget room, and it was great! Room was a little on the small side but very comfortable for us as a couple. Bathroom light was a little dark, but the shower was fantastic and always had hot water. Good location in the suburbs of Adelaide, easy to navigate and to get to other places. Perfect spot for a comfortable place to sleep after a long day.

Comfortable, clean, affordable rooms. Best budget rooms in the Adelaide area. Great location on the Torrens River, very peaceful.
Fantastic, friendly, helpful staff. Good parking.
Brilliant place... close to all the city has to offer... clean amenities and well looked after... 👌
Good people to deal with .clean rooms.and very friendly.
A nice quiet park in the city. Room just for a bed while at a wedding. My van would struggle to fit in here if I bought it.

I booked a budget unit queen room and When I arrived good cleaning, the first photo I just sat on the bed haha but when I arrived the bed was perfectly made. Bathroom very clean, just the nightstand a bit dusty but I am not very fussy. I would suggest to change the odour spray for a citric one because as soon as I got in to the room I felt a smell like Smokey and perfume 😣. Anyways, the bed is comfortable and very nice boiling shower haha I like it 👌depending who is your next door neighbour is a bit noisy but after 10pm is pretty quiet here. Wifi sometimes works fine then not much but In general, If I would come back, yes 👍
A very conveniently located caravan park, for central and near northern Adelaide. Friendly and efficient service.

A really great place to stay.
Very quite on the two occasions when we've stayed there.
Very clean amenities too!
Great little caravan park, very close to the city of Adelaide - very clean toilets and showers. Office lady was fantastic when booking us in. O barn not far away.
So unglaublich lieb die Dame am Empfang. Wir haben uns direkt wohl gefühlt. Mit 42 AUD / Nacht (powered side) sehr fair.

Quiet Motel room with a comfortable bed. I forgot my pillow and had to stack a few as they were very flat. Room was very clean. Parking for the motel rooms is not in front of the rooms as I expected - it is in front of the main building and you walk around behind that building to get to the motel room. Airconditioning worked well and staff were helpful. I would stay again.

This is a great caravan park, we only stayed one night in a cabin which was clean and comfortable.
Staff are really friendly and helpful.  It was peaceful, a gem in the middle of the city.
This caravan park is close to the city of Adelaide. Very friendly helpful staff. Clean facilities.  Walking track along river right behind park.  Quiet relaxing atmosphere
Great staff, very clean facilities and close to all the bus/cycle/walkways. A very nice place to stay in the city.

Stayed for few months before Xmas in our caravan. Although the park could be nice it's  such a shame it is run so poorly and the residents living there take over the park and all facilities. There are 3 residents living in caravans in particular that stick there noses into everyone's business and they were on site 1 and opposite is a guy called Noel, they stand on sit right on the corner staring at everyone coming and going and are just rude. Guy on site 13 thinks he can drive and park however he likes. Manager Graeme thinks he can tell traveller's rules but let's all these idiots do as they please. Worst run caravan park in Australia due to current management and residents.
Fabulous spot by the Torrens River, great for dog walks.  Amenities excellent and everyone friendly.  Will stay again.
Booked 2 hours before we arrived and no issue finding a powered site for our camper. Great caravan park close to the center of Adelaide. Very clean, tidy and quiet.
I can't rave enough about this place.  This is an awesome caravan park to stay at. Located in a very central part of town. Beds are comfy and water pressure is great!!

Great caravan park! They were really understanding when we missed our booking (ended up staying at a friend's house) and transferred the credit for another night which they really didn't have to :)
Clean amenities with plenty of space & it's right on the river with a great path for running/cycling.

We had to come to Adelaide for hubby to have day surgery and stumbled on this park. It is one of the best parks we have stayed in. Budget room was clean,bed was comfy, and best of all it was quiet.  Staff are really friendly and helpful.  Next time we come we will be staying here but will stay in a cabin.
Great location, great service and great staff. Only thing is the cabin was a little tired and grubby but they're perfectly serviceable and we will be back again. Excellent value for money.
Very helpful staff. Nice size sites for big rigs.
Have several powered site stays and it's always a pleasure 👏

Only spent a night after a late flight into Adelaide. Would have liked more time to explore the area around the park and along the river. Our cabin was very nice. The room was a good size with a good bathroom. Mini fridge, kettle and toaster made it easy to have a self-made breakfast.||On site car parking is available but not immediately outside the cabin.||Supermarkets, shops, restaurants and petrol stations are a short drive away.||Staff were friendly and helpful for our late arrival
Beutifull maintaned well planned managed closr.toall shops medcal centres  what a gem
Absolutely amazing place to stay At definitely deserves 5 stars would recommend to everyone perfect for a little get away highly recommend. :)

Have just travelled 5000km, Victoria to Queensland to Adelaide. This is one of the nicest places I have stayed. Friendly staff, clean, spacious, and a great location near parklands and close to the city. Highly recommended.

Quiet little park with great management and relief managers, I work on caravans Motorhomes and rvs and I quite frequently visit the park for work, always neat clean and greeted by friendly smiling faces. If you are looking for somewhere close to the cbd with all the creature comforts and a cheap site fee even. You can't go wrong.
Discusting state of the unit I was in none of that bathroom has been cleaned for ages I give minus 5 stars
Great 👍
Beautiful well kept Caravan park with spotless amenities.  Amazing walk trails directly behind and very pet friendly.
Great spot with walking track & cooking facilities.
Great caravan park. If we are ever back in town will definitely stay there again. Cabin was very nice and clean. Shower had awesome pressure. Nice and quiet area

Budget Units were 'Budget' and sadly lacked a window, so are dark & closed in......Otherwise has all you need.
There's a good laundry & shared kitchen facilities.
Quiet, lovely tree and bird filled location, pet friendly which is a huge bonus and gets a BIG thumbs up.
Found the managers Trish & Graeme & their staff, helpful, friendly & accommodating.
A good sized gem of a Van park in a lovely area, I do recommend!

Fabulous place to have a 'home base' whilst away.
Easy yet secure access to the grounds, clean,  quiet.  A nice river behind for walks. No place for kids to play on the camp grounds which is a bit sad but we were out all day every day so didn't matter for us.  Other times at other parks, we've need that a bit.
Lots of online contact after booking and paying online, that's helpful in a world full of scamming. When ever I emailed a Q, they replied usually that same day unless I emailed late. There is after hours check in, very simple.
Everything has been lovely.
Thank you windsor gardens caravan park
Nice place. Great amenities. Quiet.
Stayed in a Cabin along the Linear Path. Beds comfy. Kitchen enough for a few nights stay. Plan to stay a week in nicer weather.
Please stop recommending the OG hotel for meals, was the worse meal we have had in Adelaide, totally disgusting it was, no going back there. Go to the Windsor hotel, meals were great
Best caravan park quiet good rates staff are friendly and helpful spent two and a half months there would recommend to anyone
Stayed in a cabin, was a nice quiet spot, good value for money
Great place to stay will stay again.
Great caravan park
